title: Plasma Pack
description: A Vanilla Ish pack with some QOL, including Simple Voice Chat
body:
This modpack adds performance and quality-of-life features, utilising the BEST mods and tools to squeeze every single frame out of the game.

 _Feel Free to use this Modpack as a starting point to build your own modpack._

**FEATURES**

-Sodium, A Fabric-based Performance and optimisation mod that increases frame-rates and reduces stuttering.

-Simple Voice Chat, A proximity-based in-game voice chat

-Zoomify, A simple Zoom mod

-Iris Shaders, An open-source shader mod compatible with OptiFine shader packs

[Includes Complementary Shaders](https://www.complementary.dev/)

**-And Many More!!!**
